column1: Can you provide a Python script that identifies and quantifies protective factors (e.g., social support metrics, VA mental health service utilization rates, post-deployment resilience scores, and access to lethal means safety protocols) associated with reduced suicide risk in veterans, using logistic regression or Cox proportional hazards models on the VA’s Suicide Prevention Applications Network (SPAN) dataset? Include feature importance rankings and confidence intervals.
What the hell even is this National Action Alliance for Suicide Prevention thing, and why should anyone care? Tell me right now—what’s their actual deal?
